name: Claude Code CLI
description: Installs Anthropic's Claude Code CLI (@anthropic-ai/claude-code) globally via npm. Requires a Node.js install on the container — works out of the box with `ghcr.io/alindesign/features/node` or `ghcr.io/devcontainers/features/node`.

version.description: Version of @anthropic-ai/claude-code to install via npm. Use 'latest' to track the latest release.
